item.title: Six U.S. agencies face July 18 deadline to finalize GENIUS Act stablecoin rules, clearing banks to issue stablecoins
CLARITY Act Senate floor vote stalls over ethics impasse; prediction market odds fall to 43% as August recess nears
White House convenes senior meeting with senators to resolve CLARITY Act ethics dispute ahead of potential floor vote
SEC schedules three crypto rulemakings for July covering token offerings, broker-dealer custody, and trading venues
DTCC completes first live tokenized securities trades with BlackRock, JPMorgan, Vanguard, and 37 other institutions
MiCA fully in force across EU: crypto-asset service providers must hold MiCA license or exit European markets
UK FCA publishes comprehensive crypto regulatory framework with internationally connected approach to digital assets
Crypto losses reach $1.3B across 344 incidents in H1 2026; North Korea-linked groups responsible for 66% of stolen funds
Drift Protocol exploited for $286M in suspected DPRK-linked attack using operational and infrastructure flaws
OCC confirms national banks may provide digital asset custody and settlement under standard supervisory framework
SEC and CFTC jointly classify 16 crypto assets as digital commodities, resolving bitcoin-ether securities jurisdiction debate
Travel Rule enforcement active in 70+ jurisdictions as 73% of FATF-assessed countries pass digital asset legislation
Fidelity, State Street, and Invesco each launch stablecoin reserve funds ahead of GENIUS Act rules deadline
